name: Deluxe Lemon Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy saucepan, combine the sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
Mix well to ensure no lumps.
2. Gradually add the cold water and lemon juice while stirring until the mixture is smooth.
3. Beat the egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored. Gradually stir into the lemon mixture.
4. Add butter, and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly. Cook for 1 minute, stirring continuously.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the lemon rind. Pour into the prepared pastry shell.
6. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites and cream of tartar at high speed with an electric mixer until foamy.
7. Gradually add the sugar (1/2 cup plus 2 tablespoons) for the meringue, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until stiff peaks form and the sugar dissolves (about 2 to 4 minutes).
8. Beat in vanilla extract, and spread the meringue over the hot filling, sealing it to the edge of the pastry.
9. Bake at 325°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until the meringue is golden brown. Allow to cool to room temperature before serving.
